body: This stems from https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/pull/573#discussion_r2229160255 and it aims to smoothen out issues related, e.g., to https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/issues/575

labels.description: We must feed the models so they don't get cranky
labels.name: data wrangling

title: Change `ECCO_PASSWORD` to `ECCO_WEBDAV_PASSWORD`
